metadata.description: Collection of Claude Code plugins for code review and development utilities

plugins.name: diff-review
plugins.description: Interactive vimdiff code review for Claude Code file changes

plugins.name: dev-utilities
plugins.description: Development utility scripts for package management and transcripts

plugins.name: plan-review
plugins.description: Interactive section-by-section review of Claude Code plan files

plugins.name: fix-pr-interactive
plugins.description: Interactively review and address GitHub PR feedback one comment at a time

plugins.name: add-ss
plugins.description: Capture Chrome screenshots and add them to the PR Screenshots section
